issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for contract interactions.
The skill relies on thirdweb SDK, limiting its applicability to environments that support this vendor-specific library.

scenarios.name: NFT mint button in a Next.js app with email login
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wires ThirdwebProvider + createThirdwebClient, uses ConnectButton with inAppWallet({auth:{options:['email',...]}}) plus createWallet, and mints with useSendTransaction + prepareContractCall; baseline reaches for wagmi/ethers and misses inAppWallet onboarding.

scenarios.name: Server-side mint NFT via Engine REST
scenarios.rationale: Treatment POSTs to /contract/{chain}/{address}/erc721/mint-to with Authorization Bearer plus x-backend-wallet-address header and metadata body per the documented Engine call; baseline writes a custom ethers signer flow with no Engine reference.
